item.g:title: Beefeater Stainless Steel Single Door - BS23140
item.g:description: #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important; BeefEater Stainless Steel Single Door - BS23140 Beefeater BBQ Island access door is made of 304 stainless steel brushes which will last you a lifetime. Match your Beefeater Built-in BBQ with these doors when building your outdoor kitchen. The corners are welded, ground smoothed, and then given a nice brushed finish. The Beefeater Stainless Steel Single Door is a professional and well-constructed door which is designed to be compatible for use where the Beefeater barbecue and cart will be in use. The Beefeater door has a magnet to make it easy to open but also keeps it closed. All the Beefeater doors come with a nice grab handle to open and close the door. * Can be mounted for left-hand or right-hand opening. Dimensions: Width: 45.7cm Height: 55.9cm Depth: 5.1cm

item.g:title: Gasmate Large Rotisserie Kit - BA1016
Gasmate Ignite Compact Folding BBQ - BQIG10
item.g:description: The Gasmate Ignite BBQ has been designed to suit busy modern lifestyles. The one touch ignition and temperature control makes using the ignite simple and easy. Ignite's grill technology provides even heat distribution, reduced fat cooking, and flame grilled flavour with no flare ups. It can be wall mounted or attached to a stand (sold separately). It features a unique space saving design. It is compact, discreet, and stylish with the unique folding design that stores flat againts the wall. When you're finished cooking, simply fold it up and maximize your outdoor living space. The Gasmate Ignite BBQ is perfect for balconies and courtyards. The unique design and powerful cooking performance enable it to cater for 6 easily. Also available in Natural Gas (At an extra Cost) & LPG versions. Please note Gas bottle not included.

item.g:title: New Cyprus Grill / Souvla - Stainless Steel Charcoal Rotisserie Spit Package Deal (CG-0707)
item.g:description: This is a brand new Stainless Steel Cyprus Grill, it comes with all the accessories that you need to have a great party or to use in your backyard on the weekends. New design with stronger more durable base and better air flow, this Quality Stainless Steel Rotisserie Spit will be sure to impress the fussiest of BBQ enthusiasts. * Photos for illustration purposes only.

item.g:title: Cyprus Grill Heavy Duty 5 Spit Rotisserie (Product of Cyprus) - CG-8000
item.g:description: Cyprus Grill Heavy Duty 5 Spit Rotisserie (Product of Cyprus) - CG-8000 The Cyprus Grill Heavy Duty 5 Spit Rotisserie is the ideal product when looking to host large gatherings and cook plenty of meat. The Heavy Duty 5 Spit Rotisserie, as its name implies, is for heavy-duty cooking and caters to most meats including beef, lamb, chicken, goat, and pork. Being larger than the deluxe auto model, what you get is the same quick cooking times and mouthwatering evenly-cooked meats, but in larger quantities. PLEASE NOTE: NO MOTORS INCLUDED WITH THIS ROTISSERIE #description p.small { display: none; }

item.g:title: Cyprus Grill Giant Chain Driven Rotisserie BBQ (Made in Cyprus) CG-8100A
item.g:description: Rotisserie style cooking has been perfected over hundreds of years by the Cypriot people. They have truly made Rotisserie cooking an Art & they sure know how to make a Great Souvla! The heavy duty chain driven Authentic Cyprus Grill Set is a powerful and well adaptive grill barbecue that is designed to provide high rotisserie style cooking that can cook any meal to Clamb,It's ideal for most locations delivering exceptional cooking first time, every time.

item.g:title: Gasmate Portable Evaporative Cooler - CL60PM
item.g:description: Gasmate Portable Evaporative Cooler - CL60PM The Gasmate Portable Evaporative Cooler is a professional and user friendly portable cooling unit which is designed to promote easy cooling of an area with its powerful cooling properties that can be used out camping or when travelling. This cooler features a portable design and is able to promote easy transportation from one location to another. It offers an evaporation cooling method, and is perfect for providing an even spread of cold air across an area with ease. #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } Specifications: Type: Evaporative Cooler Air Conditioner Type: Cooling only Brand: Honeywell Model: CL60PM Colour: White Length: 73cm Width: 50cm Height: 105cm Weight: 22kgs #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }

item.g:title: The BBQ Store Stainless Steel Chicken BBQ Rotisserie Charcoal Spit 30kg Motor - CRB-3064
item.g:description: The BBQ Store Stainless Steel Chicken BBQ Rotisserie Charcoal Spit 30kg Motor - CRB-3064 The Chicken Rotisserie BBQ is great if you love cooking your own charcoal chicken or even large cuts of meat. It has a sleek steel design, and provides ample amounts of space for your cooking needs. The spit includes a 30kg motor enabling you to load it up with a massive amount of your favourite meats. It has a large basin to fit all of your charcoal, providing maximum cooking heat. The included Skewers and Prongs make putting your chicken on the BBQ a breeze, and with the included grill, the selection of meats that can be cooked on this BBQ are endless. The new and improved design features holes in the basin for better airflow, and the frame is sturdier due to the leg brackets. Another new feature is the ability to raise or lower the charcoal basin for your choice of heat. Come in today to get the Chicken Rotisserie BBQ and begin making memories with your family. #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } #description p.small { display: none;

item.g:title: DIY Package Deal 1 - 40 kgs electric black steel casing Charcoal Rotisserie Spit Motor, Stainless Steel Skewer and Accessories Package Deal (DIY-40B)
item.g:description: Thinking of making your own spit or replacing old parts of your existing spit, this Value Package is the perfect answer. It comes with: 40 kgs capacity 5RPM electric black steel casing motor 155cm Stainless Hollow Skewer (FREE Upgrade to a 160cm Solid Skewer - Usually $40.00 Extra) Stainless Steel Leg Bracket Stainless Steel Back Brace Stainless Steel Long 2 Prong Forks (set of 2) A Quick Release Pin 2 Black Skewer support brackets (FREE Upgrade to Stainless Steel - Usually $20.00 Extra) 2 Black Side Upright Pillars (FREE Upgrade to Stainless Steel - Usually $30.00 Extra) **Australian Tax Invoice provided and 12 months warranty included**

Bromic Supaheat II Room Heater (LPG) - Convection/Radiant - 21MJ
item.g:description: Bromic Supaheat II Room Heater (LPG) - Convection/Radiant - 21MJ Bromic's Supaheat room heater provides effective and efficient indoor heating for all types of spaces. This model is suitable for use with LPG. With its attractive silver-grey finish, the Supaheat Room Heater utilises natural convection heating to warm your space within minutes. Approved by the Australian Gas Association, the Supaheat Room Heater has achieved six-star efficiency ratings in independent tests. This item is only certified for sale to customers in NSW, QLD, NT & WA. This item cannot be installed and used in VIC, SA & TAS as per Australian State Law

item.g:title: Bromic Deluxe Wok Cooker, Double Burner, Natural Gas, with Flame Failure - DC200NG-S
item.g:description: Bromic Deluxe Wok Cooker, Double Burner, NATURAL GAS, with Flame Failure - DC200NG-S **Hose not included** The Deluxe Natural Gas Wok Cooker by Bromic is a must have for all cooking enthusiasts. It feautures a stainless steel fascia and two brass burners, all of commercial quality. The cooker maintains high performance with its two 15.80Mj dual-ring brass burners, which is ideal for high speed cooking. Both burners have seperate quick-ignition control knobs with adjustable flame capabilities. The burner features an easy to clean stainless steel fascia and drip tray, and a heavy duty cast iron trivet. This cooker is AGA approved and must be installed by an authorised person only. #description p.small { display: none; }

item.g:description: Bromic Deluxe Wok Cooker, Single Burner, NATURAL GAS, Low Pressure (1kpa) with Flame Failure and NG hose - DC100NG-S-10HTS1200 The Deluxe Natural Gas Wok Cooker by Bromic is a must have for all cooking enthusiasts. It features a stainless steel fascia and brass burners, all of commercial quality. The cooker maintains high performance with its 13.5Mj dual-ring brass burner, which is ideal for high speed cooking. It has a quick-ignition control knob with adjustable flame, an easy to clean stainless steel fascia and drip tray, and a heavy duty cast iron trivet. This Cooker has Flame Failure where it stops the Gas when the Flame is turned out by the wind. This cooker is AGA approved and must be installed by an authorised person only. #description p.small { display: none; }

item.g:title: Stainless Steel Extra Large Heavy Duty Cyprus Grill- EB-W02
item.g:description: Stainless Steel Extra Large Heavy Duty Cyprus Grill with NO motors included The Stainless Steel Heavy Duty Cyprus Grill Style Charcoal Spit Rotisserie with 2 x 20kgs variable speed motors is a great Large BBQ when cooking for a large amount of people. With its great auto height adjustable design, heavy duty stainless steel frame, it comes ready with everything required to host your next event.

item.g:title: Australian Made 3 Tier Chain Driven Rotisserie Charcoal Grill BBQ with Hood
item.g:description: Australian Made 3 Tier Chain Driven BBQ Rotisserie and Charcoal Grill with Hood Model No. CCG1000WL The Australian Made 3 Tier Chain Driven Rotisserie and Charcoal Grill is a larger style Cyprus Grill unit, made longer and wider than the regular sized Cyprus Grill. It is designed cater for larger gatherings, and is the perfect solution to cook most meat types including beef, lamb, chicken, goat and pork. The heavy duty large metal construction and chain driven design allows for high usage, and its size allows you to cook for a large number of people in a quicker time than the smaller models in the range. Designed and manufactured to our custom specifications here in Sydney Australia. Features: Automatic Rotation Function: The unique technology allows the Cyprus Grill's skewers to be turned by the motor without having to manually turn it by hand. The automatic skewer rotation is beneficial for allowing even cooking of the meat to reduce the risk of burning the food. Three Tier Cooking System: On this model there are three levels of skewers, with each level allowing nine skewers to cook your meats. This allows you to cook more than one different type of meats at one time, and because some meats cook at a lower temperature than others, the top levels allows that lower temperature to occur, as it is further away from your charcoal. Having three levels of skewers is also beneficial as it will allow you to cook more meat in a quicker time than the smaller models. Easy to clean design: As well as the size, we've made this model very easy to clean. This allows you to finish up quicker when you're done, and go and enjoy your time with family and friends. ​Wheel Design: This model also features a wheel design, which allows quick and easy transportation of your Cyprus Grill if you need to move it from place to place, or if you experience bad weather whle cooking. ​​Heavy Duty 40kg Variable Speed Motor: This Grill comes with a heavy duty 40kg variable speed motor with a cooling fan. This will ensure you can be cooking on all three levels of skewers at one time, increasing your cooking output considerably. Tough and Durable Frame and Base: This grill comes with a steel frame and base, which will stand the test of time and provide you with many years of great cooking. ​Raisable Hood: This particular model comes with a raisable hood, allowing you to keep it closed when not in use. Please Note- This is a Custom made Item, 2-3 Weeks to be made to order. @media only screen and (min-device-width : 320px) and (max-device-width : 480px) { #half { min-width:100%; } .right { padding:0px !important; float:right; } } #container_web { max-width:550px; height:100%; background: url(https://rotisseriespit.com.au/image_library/ebay_images/common/dark_wall.png); color: #FFFFFF; font-size:14px; line-height:18px; font-family:Helvetica, Arial, "Gill Sans", "Gill Sans MT", "Myriad Pro", "DejaVu Sans Condensed", sans-serif; } #container_web p { padding-left:10px; padding-right:10px; margin-top:0px; color: white; line-height:20px; } #container_web em { color:#ed8000; font-style:normal; } #half { width:265px; } .left { float:left; } .right { padding:0 5px 0 0; float:right; } #mid_icons { padding:0px; width:550px; float:left; margin:0px; } .widget { position: relative; width: 100%; } .widget-tabs { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 9px 12px 0; text-align: left; font-size:1em; font-family:"Gill Sans", "Gill Sans MT", "Myriad Pro", "DejaVu Sans Condensed", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; /* Make the last tab in the DOM the left-most tab on the screen. item.g:title: DISPLAY Beefeater Signature ProLine Integrated FFD barbecue and lid
item.g:description: The BeefEater Signature ProLine integrated barbecue now features flame failure, multipurpose cast iron furnishings, a side burner, and a great oil management system. The design is sleek, classy, streamlined and elegant, and will suit your outdoor kitchen perfecly. If you want your outdoor entertaining area to look great, then these are the barbecues for you. With a modern design and incredible power, the Signature ProLine range of integrated barbecues offer all the premium features you've come to expect from such a trusted brand. Features: A FIVE-STAR BARBECUE EXPERIENCE Our broad range of optional extras can help you create your perfect barbecue. Plus, whether you prefer an open grill or a solid hotplate, our range of customisable cast iron furnishings offers different cooking configurations to suit your needs. EFFORTLESS ENTERTAINING Turn everyday outdoor entertaining into a gourmet experience. The optional integrated QuadBurner™ is designed to sit alongside the integrated barbecue. With uncompromised power and lashings of style, you can easily cater to any number of guests and their tastes. INTENSIVE CLEANING CYCLE Keep your cast iron hotplate and cast iron grills looking their best with our quick and easy cleaning feature. Simply open your barbecue hood or lid, remove any stainless steel attachments and turn on all burners to boost level. In 30 minutes, cooking residue will turn to ash, so all you need to do is wipe clean. SUPERIOR OIL MANAGEMENT SYSTEM Healthier cooking and an easy-to-clean barbecue are yours thanks to the superior oil management system. Oil and waste run into easily removable containers at the front of the barbecue, while the unique angled surface drains oil away from food. RELIABLE CAST Enjoy fast heat-up, superior heat retention and consistent cooking results with the cast grill and cast hotplate. The cast elements are also simple to clean, so you can keep your barbecue looking its best for many years to come. Size: 1053w x 540d x 42h (mm)

item.g:title: Napoleon Rodeo Charcoal Leg - NK22K-LEG-2
item.g:description: #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important; Napoleon Rodeo Charcoal Leg - NK22K-LEG-2 The compact NK22K-LEG-2 Rodeo Charcoal Kettle Grill provides a traditional charcoal grill that can feed a big crowd, with tremendous manoeuvring capability, thanks to its solid all-weather wheels. The powder-coated aluminum cart is light and durable, allowing you to easily take this charcoal grill to wherever the action is. The heavy gauge steel charcoal grate and cast iron hinged cooking grids allow fast and easy, direct and indirect cooking. Enjoy grilling, roasting, and smoking with much ease. Ideal for charcoal enthusiasts, experience charcoal grilling with Napoleon's compact and mobile Charcoal Kettle Grill. Grilling, roasting, and smoking are a breeze, the hinged grids make it easy to reload charcoal or add wood for smoking. Charcoal is all about controlling heat and airflow, the stainless steel heat diffuser evenly distributes heat, and directs spent charcoal to the ash catcher. The improved PRO Air Control system increases airflow and temperature accuracy while preventing water from entering the grill. The lid features a built-in lid hanger and cool touch handle to keep your hands away from the heat while grilling.

item.g:title: Bradley Digital 6-Rack Smoker 240 Volt (EX-DEMO)
item.g:description: Bradley Digital 6-Rack Smoker 240 Volt The new 6-rack Digital Smoker includes all the features of the Original Smoker along with the benefits of digital technology. Temperature, time, and smoke are now completely controllable so you can decide how much smoke you want, how long your food is going to be smoked for, and at what temperature. Perfect for entertaining, creating gourmet foods in your own home, or just enjoying the flavour that smoking brings, the new Bradley Digital Smokers offer an easier and better way to automatically roast, smoke and BBQ in the outdoors! Click here for recipes FINANCE OPTION: Weekly Rent $16.44

item.g:title: DISPLAY CROSSRAY Infrared 4 Burners In-Built Unit - TCS4FL (DISPLAY MODEL)
item.g:description: CROSSRAY Infrared 4 Burners, 4 x 11MJ/hr, 304 Stainless Steel lid front & rear body panels, Die cast aluminium side and end panels, LED illuminated control knob. THE INTENSITY & QUALITY OF CHARCOAL, WITH THE CONVENIENCE & CONTROL OF GAS The patented CROSSRAY+ system uses infrared burners mounted at the sides of the barbeque, angled up at the cooking surface. Because the burners are infrared, they have superior performance to traditional open flame burners. Infrared heat penetrates your food, keeping it moist and fresh, whereas an open flame just heats the air around it – ultimately drying out your food. CROSSRAY+ infrared burners are also more efficient and cook faster than traditional burners. So your food is ready sooner and you use less gas. As the burners are not directly beneath the cooking surface, fat and juices drain away, reducing smoke and virtually eliminating the flare-ups that char your food (leaving the inside uncooked). HOW DOES IT WORK? With laterally mounted infrared burners, the CROSSRAY burner system creates an even bed of predictable heat that combines the intensity of charcoal, with the convenience and control of gas – you don’t need to be an expert to produce professional quality food… WHY IS CROSSRAY BETTER? Infrared burners provide significantly more heat and use less gas, meaning better performance and lower running costs No need for multiple cooking appliances; CROSSRAY does it all. Cook your traditional BBQ fare of steak and sausages, pizza, chicken, vegetables, seafood, roasts, or use as an outdoor oven and perfect as a Low n’ Slow smoker Get expert results without being a professional chef – cooks your food evenly, from the inside out, keeping it moist and fresh Built from the best materials, it’s extremely robust and constructed to last Reduces smoke and dangerous flare-ups - for the ultimate outdoor cooking experience Added market leading features such as electronic ignition, LED illuminated knobs and large upper level cooking area – if you want the best, it’s CROSSRAY

item.g:title: DISPLAY HEATSTRIP 1800W, 240V, 50Hz, 7.5A, 1P55 Classic Radiant Electric Heaters
item.g:description: HEATSTRIP 1800W, 240V, 50Hz, 7.5A, 1P55 Classic Radiant Electric Heaters HEATSTRIP Classic is an Australian designed, engineered and assembled range of premium, high-intensity energy efficient electric heaters - suitable for indoor and outdoor heating applications. Using the radiant heat principle, HEATSTRIP Classic is a stylish and energy efficient heating option, ideal for outdoor undercover applications such as alfresco dining and BBQ areas, patios, verandahs, courtyards, balconies, both residentially and commercially. Ideal indoor heating applications include spot heating in factories, showrooms, warehouses, assembly lines, halls etc. NOTE: Controller is NOT included Features & Benefits Why choose HEATSTRIP electric heaters? Typically, there is constant air movement in an outdoor or open indoor area. Therefore, many conventional patio heaters rely on convection heating, which works by heating the surrounding air. This can be quite impractical for these areas, as this heated air can easily be blown away with natural air movement. Combating this problem, Thermofilm’s radiant style heaters transfer heat directly to objects through infra-red waves. Whilst convection heaters warm the air in between objects, radiant heaters heat the surface of the objects themselves. HEATSTRIP electric heaters are more effective within an outdoor or uninsulated indoor area because they provide targeted warmth directly to the people and objects in their path. How does it work? Our range of heaters can give you comfortable, radiant warmth. Similar to the radiant heat rays emitted by the sun, the ceiling mounted HEATSTRIP Classic range of heaters emits radiant warmth from above. A unique electric heating element and alloy heating surface produces even, radiant warmth directly to individual people and surfaces below. Unlike traditional outdoor gas heaters, which aim to heat the surrounding air and can result in high temperatures close to the heat source and lower temperatures further away, the radiant heat emitted by the HEATSTRIP Classic penetrates through the air to provide a comfortable, even temperature. The heater that is a design feature Complete with subtle, unobtrusive minimalist design, the attractive HEATSTRIP Classic comes with a black face and anodised alloy rear casing. The stylish, slimline face of the HEATSTRIP Classic does not emit light or glow when in use, blending elegantly into your décor. Whether you have a traditional or ultra-modern design, a HEATSTRIP heater is the perfect addition. Multiple Applications Residential Outdoor alfresco and entertaining areas Patios, BBQ zones and outdoor kitchens Courtyards and balconies Verandahs and pergolas Garages and sheds Commercial Cafes Pubs and clubs Restaurants and gaming venues Factories Warehouses Showrooms Halls Efficient, cost-effective electric heating The innovative design of the HEATSTRIP heater enables comfortable and even heat dispersion from the heater surface with minimal operating costs, providing an enjoyable and gentle warmth. The innovative design of the HEATSTRIP heater enables comfortable and even heat dispersion from the heater surface with minimal operating costs, providing an enjoyable and gentle warmth. The cost of running a HEATSTRIP heater is considerably less than gas-bottled patio heaters. Using less of the Earth’s resources, installing one of our HEATSTRIP heaters will ensure that you’re doing your bit for the environment. Design flexibility Four HEATSTRIP Classic models are available from 1500W to 3200W, ensuring the heating requirements of any undercover outdoor or open indoor area are met. Brackets for direct ceiling and wall or ceiling angled mounting are supplied as standard. Optional HEATSTRIP accessories include beam or fixed umbrella mount brackets, extension mount brackets, chain suspension brackets, twin mount brackets and flush mounting enclosures. Minimal maintenance The HEATSTRIP Classic has no internal moving parts, ensuring quiet and virtually maintenance free operation. Australian owned Designed, engineered and assembled in Australia, the HEATSTRIP Classic is fully backed by a 24 month residential warranty, and 12 month commercial warranty. Local service and support provides peace of mind. Easy to use The standard HEATSTRIP Classic is controlled by a simple on/off operation, either when plugged directly into a power point, or hard-wired via a wall mounted on/off switch. Models THH1500A, THH1800A & THH2400A are supplied with a lead and plug and can be connected to a normal domestic power point, making it an easy DIY installation. Model THH3200A requires hard-wiring by a qualified electrician to a 15amp power supply. Corrosion protection The unique alloy casing material allows the heater to be used in corrosive environments such as coastal/seaside locations, outdoor kitchens and around saltwater pools etc. Control options It is recommended to install your HEATSTRIP heater with a timer controller to ensure the unit is turned of

item.g:title: DISPLAY Special Edition Cyprus Grill Modern Rotisserie Spit with Rechargeable Motor
item.g:description: DISPLAY MODEL Special Edition Cyprus Grill Modern Rotisserie Spit with Rechargeable Motor This is the latest product from The Cyprus Grill. A rechargable Li Ion Rechargeable Variable Speed Motor is great for taking on picnics/outings. No more messy wires or trip hazards. This new design has the Large skewers operating on a Chain Drive system with all three large stainless steel skewers at the same height. This gives you an advantage when cooking the same meats as they all cook together at the same time. This model also comes with The Cyprus Grill Trademark Height Adjustment System (all three skewers raise and lower together at the same time). Get in Quick as this model is only available for a limited time!!!!

item.g:title: Portable Rotisserie Spit Package, tripod folding legs
item.g:description: Portable Rotisserie Spit Package, with tripod folding legs This is the quintessential piece of cooking equipment that is portable when you need it to be. Take it away with you camping or set it over a fireplace. It comes with 2 tripod folding legs. The motor locks onto the one of the legs and the skewer goes onto the other. Then simply create an open fire beneath the skewer and cook your meat! The 10mm skewer length is approximately 90cm. Just add food and flame. Portable and motorized Spit Rotisserie, for that bistro - roasted taste anytime, anywhere. Rotisseries rotate food over heat for that thoroughly chargrilled flavor. With this Spit Rotisserie, you can feast on rotisserie-cooked food whenever and wherever you get the feeling! It's portable and rechargable battery-powered, so it goes where you go, from the boat to the backyard. And it's ideal for roasting your "catch of the day" while you're camping, fishing or hunting. Use over open fire, charcoal bed or barbeque grill. Spit Rotisserie is Great for that summer BBQ Holds up to 15kg of meat and comes with 2 stainless steel forks. Don"t forget the rotisserie basket (sold separately) for those roasted veggies.

item.g:title: Platinum Smart-Heat 500 Series Gas Radiant Heater, 42MJ, Natural Gas
item.g:description: Platinum Smart-Heat™ 500 Series Natural Gas Heater Durability meets power. The award-winning Platinum Smart-Heat™ Natural Gas heater series melds high-performance stainless-steel construction with strong, directional heating. Available in two sizes and a wide array of ceiling and wall mounting options. Ensuring a reliable start and effective operation even in winds of up to 18km/h, Bromic's patented Direct Ignition System is unique to our Smart-Heat™ Gas outdoor heater series. The Platinum Smart-Heat™ Gas series incorporates full-function electronic controls that allow remote operation; patented screen and ionisation probe technology that provides remarkable wind resistance, plus easy pivot arm brackets for greater positioning versatility and directional heat control. Tinted Glass-Ceramic Fascia Maximise performance and deliver a superior spread of heat with the tinted glass-ceramic fascia Environmental Efficiency Slow-release ceramic burners are supremely efficient and the most environmentally-friendly gas-fired heating method available. Strong, Directional Heat Deliver robust radiant heat where it’s needed, with easy pivot arm brackets providing directional control. Patented Direct Ignition System Instantaneous ignition, whenever you require it, without the need for a pilot light. Set and forget Simple and easy to use, with smart system compatibility and automated re-ignition. Wireless Control Capabilities Seamless remote heater control with our genuine wireless control accessories. Elegant & Unique Design Make your heater a feature or have it blend seamlessly into the background, thanks to a beautiful and elegant design. Wind Resistance Innovative patented technology ensures reliable function in wind speeds up to 18km/h. Versatile Mounting A range of dedicated ceiling and wall mount options let you reclaim valuable floor space. This product must be installed by a licensed technician who must complete "Pre-installation checklist" and all other instructions.

item.g:title: Hark Hickory Pit Offset Smoker Display
item.g:description: DISPLAY MODEL Hark Hickory Pit Offset Smoker ONE UNIT THAT CAN DO SO MUCH The Hark Hickory Pit Offset Smoker can be fuelled by charcoal or wood, or a combination of both. Depending on the food you are cooking, wood chunks and even woodchips are a great way of achieving specific flavours. Once you cook with the Hickory pit, you’ll never want to use a gas grill again! SMOKING Fancy some mouth-watering brisket, delicious pulled pork or sticky ribs? You can become a professional BBQ Pitmaster in your own backyard, cooking low n slow on the Hickory Pit Offset Smoker. Once you have built a fire in your firebox using either charcoal, wood or a combination of both, the heat and smoke will move from the firebox into the cooking chamber. This indirect cooking method also infuses your food with delicious smoke flavour. In order regulate the amount of heat and smoke produced, simply adjust the air dampers on the firebox and the baffle plates in the cooking chamber. Depending on the type of food being cooked and the length of your cook, you may need to add more fuel from time to time. And when it comes to low n slow cooking, we recommend you always use a good thermometer to track the internal temperature of your food. GRILLING The Hickory Pit Offset Smoker can reach impressive temperatures, perfect for searing steaks and burgers over charcoal or wood. For extra grilling capacity, the cooking chamber and firebox can be used at the same time. In fact the firebox cooking grills are perfect for searing steaks over direct flame. In order to prepare your Hickory Pit for grilling, simply remove the baffle plates prior to grilling and ensure you build a clean, hot charcoal and/or wood fire before placing meat on the grill. The benefit of grilling with the Hark Hickory pit, is that you get perfectly cooked food with the added benefit of sumptuous smoke • Cooking chamber size 915mm length x 400mm depth • Fire Box Size 425mm length x 365mm depth • Charcoal grates included in the cooking chamber so you can smoke and also do direct cooking • Charcoal grates included in the Firebox so you can also do direct cooking • Pull out ash tray with air vent control. • Collapsible food preparation shelf, bottle opener and side handle • Flat firebox lid for warming marinades and sauces • Chrome plated steel cool touch handles and large temperature gauge • Wood storage shelf, grease bucket, sturdy tube legs and steel wheels • Adjustable baffles for even heat distribution flavours.

item.g:title: Argie Grillz Gaucho Series Parrilla BBQ with Height Adjustable Grill Pro Model - AGG-003
item.g:description: Argie Grillz Gaucho Series Parrilla BBQ with Height Adjustable Grill Pro Model - AGG-003 The Argentinian BBQ is made from 304 stainless steel, it offers the ability to adjust the cooking height up to 60 cm using the wheel on the right, which turns clockwise. In order to drop the height, the lever must be released. This allows you to control your cooking based on the amount of heat the charcoal is producing. The Gaucho series, Pro model BBQ has a firebox made from 10mm round stainless steel on the side, this allows you to prepare wood or charcoal before placing it under the grill. The cooking area offered is 112cm W x 53cm D. giving you a total cooking area of 5936 cm2. The stainless steel V channel grills are made of 2mm stainless steel and are heavy-duty. The V channels accommodate juices and dripping to help eliminate flare-ups, the juices are directed to a removable stainless steel drip tray for use in basting to make sauces and gravies or to make clean-up easy. These V-channel grills are quickly removable for easy cleaning. Inside the base and sides are refractory bricks to help retain and direct the heat of the charcoal, giving a better cook while using less charcoal. The Gaucho series Parrilla easily moves thanks to its four heavy-duty lockable caster wheels. Imagine the taste of a butterflied suckling pig, some lamb, beef or even a large chicken. This Argentinian BBQ would be perfect for anything you want to flame grill. Please reach the BBQ store to arrange delivery. item.g:title: DISPLAY MODEL - 40kg Capacity 304 Grade Stainless Steel BBQ Spit Rotisserie Motor For Round Skewer - SSS-3073
item.g:description: DISPLAY MODEL The stainless steel heavy 304 grade duty spit motor that is designed to offer easy rotation of balanced meat up to 40kgs at a time to ensure that they are cooked evenly without burning the outer layer of meat. Factory tested at 40 kgs, this rotisserie spit motor is constructed from stainless steel and is designed with an inbuilt cooling fan to help reduce it from becoming over heated when cooking for long periods at a time. Designed to turn at 5RPM, this spit grill barbecue motor delivers a 220-240V / 25W / 50Hz direct drive power capacity and is suitable for a round skewer shaft that is up to 22mm in diameter allowing for optimal rotation when used in the most demanding cooking situations. With its attractive appearance, this outdoor BBQ grill spit motor not only looks great against your grill barbecue for an aesthetically pleasing appearance, it can also promote high powered operation that allows for reliable, optimal cooking time to ensure it is ready to serve in the shortest amount of time. Australian Tax Invoice provided and 12 months warranty included Also available: skewers, leg brackets, counter balances, prongs, back braces, gyro discs to suit, please contact us for more details

item.g:description: Limited Deals Available! Black Friday Package 7 - 2021-BF-07-BUNDLE #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } #description p.small { display: none; } Package includes: 1 x Daniel Boone Choice Pellet Smoker - DBWF 2 x GMG Premium Apple Pellets - GMG-2002 1 x Holy Cow Meat Church ( 1 of each)- 10177 1 x Holy Gospel Meat Church - 10178 The Daniel Boone WiFi Model comes with a digital WiFi controller (control and monitor through our iOS or Android mobile application), a meat probe, a peaked lid for stand-up chicken/large fowl/rib racks, a convenience tray with utensil hooks, hard rubber tires, and a venturi-style firebox for cyclone combustion. It also has Sense-Mate, a thermal sensor which constantly monitors the ambient temperature. When the weather gets cold, the sensor kicks the grill into Turbo mode, so you don’t have to wait long for the grill to heat up! Other features include a positive pressure hopper fan to prevent burn-back, “fan only” mode with automatic shut-off to blow ash out of the firebox after you finish grilling, a 2955 sq. cm.cooking surface and a clearance height of 34cm inside.

item.g:title: Gaganis Bros SOUVLA GAGANIS PLATINUM EDITION - 08810613
item.g:description: #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important; Gaganis Bros SOUVLA GAGANIS PLATINUM EDITION - 08810613 Brand New Design. Even Better Value. Nothing more to buy. Everything you need comes with this great unit. Cook, cuts of lamb, pork, chicken or beef, sausages, chops, basically anything you can throw at it.Finished in a high temp powder coat that will last the time. Gaganis Souvla is an innovative three way cooking system designed to feed a few people or cater for a party. You can cook meat, fish, poultry and vegetables on the unit using the three way cooking system. The three way cooking system works like this: Three long skewers –cut whole lamb, goat or pork into chunks and feed them through each of the three long skewers. You can also cook whole chicken, rabbit or quail on these skewers. There are sufficient numbers of prongs to keep the meat together, stable and fastened to the skewers. Ensure you use these prongs so that the meat is held tight. Switch the motor on and the long skewers will rotate and cook the meat perfectly. Short (Kebab) skewers – make kebabs by using smaller pieces of lamb, goat, pork, chicken, scallops, prawns or other small seafood pieces and vegetables such as zucchini, capsicum and onions. These kebab sized skewers will turn once the motor is activated and allow the heat to evenly cook the food. Grill – when not using the kebab skewers, place any other item you would like to cook on the grill. This could include sausages, vegetables, potatoes,shell fish, meat or saganaki cheese. An instant charcoal BBQ!

item.g:title: Heatstrip Wall Mounted LPG Gas Outdoor Heater - TGH34WL-2
item.g:description: #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important; Heatstrip Wall Mounted LPG Gas Outdoor Heater - TGH34WL-2 The new and upgraded HEATSTRIP® Wall Mounted LPG heater is a stylish addition to any outdoor area, where mains natural gas is preferred. World-class design aesthetics, heat output and performance, for both residential and commercial applications. NEW market-leading electronic finger-pull On/Off ignition makes operation so simple, World class design aesthetics quality and wind protection. Ideal for your alfresco area or commercial application. Constructed from stainless steel with high-temperature paint coating provides corrosion protection for even the harshest environment. Wall Mounted LPG Heater (LPG), 34MJ, 4 Tile, Electronic finger-pull ignition, 2 mounting angles, LPG regulator assembly included. For the standard heat reflector supplied with the heater, a 500mm overhead clearance is required. For low clearance mounting, please use the optional Heatshield (TGHAC-003) which provides for a 300mm overhead clearance. For high ceilings or mounting flexibility, the optional Ceiling Mount Extension Pole (TGHAC-004) can be used to reduce the height of the heater by 500mm or for mounting from the ceiling when a wall is not available.

item.g:title: (Display Model) Woodfiredoven Piccolo pizza oven with rotating floor tuscan sun- oven-001-y-DIS
item.g:description: Piccolo pizza oven with rotating floor tuscan sun- oven-001-y-DIS The Piccolo rotating pizza oven is a new generation, portable and high quality woodfired oven. It is our most compact gourmet oven, with an intricate and stylish design, very easy and efficient to use and amazingly fast. A must have if you enjoy good food. We designed and engineered Piccolo to make wood fired cooking a easy and enjoyable, and something everyone can do. No wood fired cooking experience needed! Piccolo cooks faster than your kitchen oven, and with that unique flavour and cosy atmosphere only wood fire creates. It is super easy to light the fire and takes only 10 minutes to reach cooking temperature. With the rotating cooking floor there is no need to turn the pizza or oven dish. Just place it in the oven, close the door and watch your meal cook evenly to perfection. Making Piccolo the easiest wood fired oven to use! It is like a wood fired microwave. Piccolo is a fantastic addition to any outdoor setting. And due to its weight and size it is also very suitable for smaller areas like balconies or patios, or as part of your BBQ setting. Perfect for everyday use; a night out at home with the kids or a pizza party with family and friends. 38 kg of quality, Piccolo is built to last, engineered to perform, designed to please. item.g:description: Woodfiredoven Piccolo pizza oven with rotating floor Midnight Black- oven-001-b-DIS The Piccolo rotating pizza oven is a new generation, portable and high quality woodfired oven. It is our most compact gourmet oven, with an intricate and stylish design, very easy and efficient to use and amazingly fast. A must have if you enjoy good food. We designed and engineered Piccolo to make wood fired cooking a easy and enjoyable, and something everyone can do. No wood fired cooking experience needed! Piccolo cooks faster than your kitchen oven, and with that unique flavour and cosy atmosphere only wood fire creates. It is super easy to light the fire and takes only 10 minutes to reach cooking temperature. With the rotating cooking floor there is no need to turn the pizza or oven dish. Just place it in the oven, close the door and watch your meal cook evenly to perfection. Making Piccolo the easiest wood fired oven to use! It is like a wood fired microwave. Piccolo is a fantastic addition to any outdoor setting. And due to its weight and size it is also very suitable for smaller areas like balconies or patios, or as part of your BBQ setting. Perfect for everyday use; a night out at home with the kids or a pizza party with family and friends. 38 kg of quality, Piccolo is built to last, engineered to perform, designed to please. Piccolo, the beauty of wood fired cooking. #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } Free inclusions: Piccolo Pizza peel, Cover and hand-held laser thermometer for pizza baking! Piccolo is now back in stock !! Grazie per la vostra pazienza. Check our brand new colours, Tuscan Sun and Midnight Black. Our newest version includes: chimney in 1 piece for better draw. Setting Up Your Piccolo Pizza Oven Video:

item.g:title: (Display Model) Portable pizza and gourmet oven My-Fiamma Midnight black (Trolley stand not included)- oven-fiamma-b-DIS
item.g:description: Portable pizza and gourmet oven My-Fiamma Midnight black (Trolley stand not included)- oven-fiamma-b-DIS Its quality and design make it stand out from the rest. Our portable pizza oven My-Fiamma Decor is the same oven as the Fiamma with the Mosaic door arch. Only the door arch decoration is different. The mosaic tiles are applied to double walled stainless steel door arch, whereas the stainless steel art decoration is applied onto the powder coated, double walled stainless steel door arch. The new My-Fiamma Decor comes in 2 colours with unique door arch decorations : Olive green, with stainless steel decorative laser design door arch. Midnight black, with stainless steel decorative laser design door arch. Here to see the trolley stand.

item.g:title: (Display Model) Portable pizza and gourmet oven My-Fiamma Olive green (Trolley stand not included)- oven-fiamma-g-DIS
item.g:description: Portable pizza and gourmet oven My-Fiamma Midnight black (Trolley stand not included)- oven-fiamma-g-DIS The making of the My-Fiamma portable pizza ovens: My-Fiamma is a medium size pizza oven, it is robust and of high quality. No compromise on the materials used, hence the weight of 90kg comparing to other portable ovens! It is made of 3 layers stainless steel and has a refractory tiled oven floor. The double oven walled dome is insulated with 50mm ceramic blanket for optimum heat retention. The oven floor is insulated with 40mm high density fibre board ensuring that the heat stays in the oven floor tiles, which is a must to get a really nice and crispy pizza crust instead of a chewy crust, pizza after pizza. No need to heat up again after a few pizzas. And the specially designed stainless steel baffle inside the dome makes that the heat is used more efficiently and reflects faster to the oven floor, making it ideal for the best wood fire pizza. This oven won't let you down. Even the oven door is double walled and insulated! Cooking in the My-Fiamma pizza oven: This stainless steel wood fired oven does the same job as our brick ovens: it cooks the perfect pizza (3 at the time) in only a few minutes. And of course also perfect roasts, beautiful curries, roasted vegetables, and many other recipes such as smoked dishes, and not to forget genuine home made bread, all with that authentic wood fired flavour. Cooking in My-Fiamma is so easy, you will hardly use your kitchen oven anymore once you start enjoying your Fiamma. The other attractive asset is its fast heat up time. The quality of the materials and its design allow for a heat up time of only 15 to 20 minutes, depending on the wood you use and on the cooking temperature needed for what you would like to cook. And because of its design and the double insulation it is very economical in wood use. Outdoor oven: The outer dome is finished with an outdoor quality powder coating, available in the colours olive green or black, and the unique mosaic design on the door arch matches the colour of the oven dome. It neatly stands out in your barbecue area or on the verandah or in your backyard, or even on your balcony. There is also a matching trolley stand for easy moving your oven around the garden to where you would like to use it. The new My-Fiamma Decor comes in 2 colours with unique door arch decorations : Olive green, with stainless steel decorative laser design door arch. Midnight black, with stainless steel decorative laser design door arch. Here to see the trolley stand.

item.g:title: (Display Model) Trolley stand for My-Fiamma pizza ovens (Oven not included)- TF-2L-DIS
item.g:description: Trolley stand for My-Fiamma pizza ovens (Oven not included)- TF-2L-DIS Brand new design trolley stand for our My-Fiamma pizza ovens. Our new trolley is a high quality, robust trolley stand in stainless steel with powder coated shelves. It has 2 removable side boards, so your oven can be stored away in a small corner if needed. It has 4 castor wheels for easy moving around the house. 2 Wheels have brakes. It supports up to 200kg. Available in Olive Green and Slate Grey, matching the new series of our Fiamma ovens.

item.g:title: My-Chef Decor oven, with stainless steel door arch decoration Midnight black (Trolley stand not included) - oven-chef-b
item.g:description: #description p.small {display: none !important;}#customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } My-Chef Decor oven, with stainless steel door arch decoration Midnight black (Trolley stand not included) - oven-chef-b Here we have the same My-Chef gourmet and pizza oven as the My-Chef with Mosaic Arch. Only the door arch decoration if different. Whereas the mosaic tiles are applied to the arched refractory bricks of the door arch, the stainless steel art decoration is applied onto the stainless steel door arch that lays over the arched bricks. And please check here for the trolley stand (TC-1L). The brand new design My-Chef Decor comes in 2 colours with unique door arch decorations : . Olive green (oven-chef-g) , with stainless steel decorative laser design door arch . Midnight black (oven-chef-b) , with stainless steel decorative laser design door arch The making of My-Chef oven: My Chef wood fired gourmet oven's unique design consists of a double walled dome in 2mm punched stainless steel. It has a structured powder coated finish so it is really easy to keep it looking good, no need to polish as you would have to with bare stainless steel, and no cracking! In between the double domes is a triple layer of commercial grade insulation blanket! Even the oven door is double walled and insulated. The oven floor is insulated with 40mm high density fibreboard ensuring the heat stays in the oven. The oven floor itself is in refractory tiles to withstand high temperatures. The very high grade insulation of the oven dome and floor make this oven ideal for slow cooking as it retains the heat for a long time. So after for example a pizza lunch or pizza night you can slow-cook a nice pulled pork or a curry or home made bread in the remaining heat. The other attractive asset is its fast heat up time. The stainless steel dome instead of brick dome and the quality of the materials used, allow for a heat up time of only around 20-25 minutes for roasting and cooking and around 30 minutes for pizza at 350°C. And because of its design and the triple commercial grade insulation, it is very economical in wood use. Cooking in the My-Chef: My Chef gourmet and pizza oven is ideal for all sorts of cooking. You can cook anything that you would cook in your kitchen oven. That authentic wood fired flavour is something unique that turns even the simplest meal into a special meal. The stainless steel dome makes that the heat reflects faster to the oven floor which makes it ideal for the best pizza. And the extra insulated oven floor ensures that the heat stays in the oven floor tiles, which is a must to get a really nice and crispy pizza crust instead of a chewy crust. And of course My-Chef also cooks perfect roasts, vegetables, beautiful slow cooked meats and many other recipes, and not to forget genuine home made bread. With your Chef you will enjoy cooking for and with your family more than ever before. Outdoor oven: The intrigue design of the My Chef gourmet oven makes it stand out in your entertaining area, or even just by itself in your verandah or patio. It looks and cooks great! We also have a matching trolley stand for this gourmet oven, making it easy to move your oven around to the area where you would like to use it. So your dinner night does not depend on the weather. Click here to see the trolley stand. Here to see the trolley stand (TC-1L).

item.g:title: Ooni Pizza Party Starter Bundle - OONIPARTY-BUNDLE
item.g:description: Ooni Pizza Party Starter Bundle - OONIPARTY-BUNDLE #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important; Looking for the perfect addition to your Ooni Pizza Oven? Look no further than the Ooni Pizza Party Starter Bundle, these accessories are designed to kick your cooking expereince up a notch! This Bundle includes the following Ooni Accessories: 1x Ooni | Pizza Topping Station - UU-P0CE00 It’s the perfect tool for prepping ingredients and toppings.The two 1.6L and four 0.8L Ooni Pizza Topping containers ensure you have plenty of toppings to keep the pizza flowing. 1x Ooni | Dual Platform Digital Cooking Scales - UU-P0A800 Streamline your pizza prep and make the perfect dough every time with our Ooni Dual Platform Digital Scales. Measure out all your ingredients to a tenth of a gram using the brushed stainless steel platforms, a dual LCD display to see both platform measurements simultaneously, and a custom-fit measuring dish for yeast or herbs. 1x Ooni | Cleaning Brush - UU-P06800 The Ooni Pizza Oven Brush is a 2-in-1 stone baking board brush and scraper tool featuring a comfortable wooden handle, plus a durable stainless steel scraper and bristles. The perfect tool for efficiently and quickly cleaning your Ooni pizza oven after cooking, brush off excess flour with the bristles, then flip to scrape away fallen food. 1x Ooni | Cast Iron Skillet Pan - UU-P09F00 Don't Limit yourself to just Pizzas, the premium cast iron Ooni Skillet is perfect for cooking meat, seafood, vegetables and much more in your Ooni pizza oven. The Ooni Skillet comes with a custom-designed removable cast iron handle making it easy to get sizzling hot food straight from your oven to the table, and a sustainably sourced wooden board for serving.

item.g:title: AR630FS
item.g:description: Electrolux Rangehood Ducting - Upper flue cover extension (1200mm) - AR630FS Enhance and complete your rangehood installation with the 1200mm Stainless Steel Cover Flue Outer, designed to deliver a clean, modern, and professional finish. Crafted for use with compatible ventilation systems, it helps conceal internal ducting while maintaining a streamlined appearance in contemporary kitchens. Ideal for new installations, upgrades, or replacements, this cover flue outer provides a polished aesthetic that complements stainless steel appliances while supporting a cohesive kitchen design. #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important;

item.g:title: DISPLAY BeefEater 7000 Series Premium 5 burner built In BBQ, Stainless Steel - BBF7655SA-DIS
item.g:description: #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important; BeefEater 7000 Series Premium 5 burner built In BBQ, Stainless Steel - BBF7655SA-DIS 17MJ Cast Stainless Steel Burners with cast stainless burners and stainless-steel vaporisers, you have one of the most durable, flexible, and efficient cooking systems available. Cast iron heats quickly, maintain consistency and lasts a very long time. With 17MJ of power in each burner, sear steaks at high heat, or turn the power down, giving you the choice in what you cook and how you cook it. And the stainless-steel vaporisers efficiently disperse the flames across the grill & plate surfaces whilst reducing those flare-ups. #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } Benefits: DURABLE, FLEXIBLE, AND EFFICIENT: With cast iron burners and stainless-steel vaporisers, you have one of the most durable, flexible, and efficient cooking systems available. Cast iron heats quickly, maintain consistency, and lasts a very long time. With 17MJ of power in each burner, you can always turn the power down, giving you the choice in what you cook and how you cook it. And the stainless-steel vaporisers efficiently disperse the flames across the grill & plate surfaces whilst reducing those flare-ups. EXPAND THE EXPERIENCE: Expand your BBQ experience and craft mouth-watering roasts and slow-cooked meals with the inclusion of a 11MJ rear ceramic burner. Combine the rear burner with the elevated cooking rack to keep your food warm without over cooking. SPACIOUS and DURABLE CAST IRON COOKTOP: Cook up a feast for many for years to come on our spacious and durable cooktop. Made from cast iron, the cooking surface doesn't chip and rust resistant, whilst heating quickly and evenly and holding its warmth for the best cooking experience. The split grill plates also means you can customise your cooking surface as you need it. SEEING IN THE DARK: BBQ up a feast even at night with the helpful lighting features. Simply flick on the light switch when you are cooking. The back hood lights give you better visibility and the LED illuminated control dials show you what power level you are at so you cook that perfect meal. THE PERFECT VIEW: Keep an eye on what's cooking without lifting the lid. Maintain heat using the built-in temperature gauge or peer through the full width glass viewing window to check how those sausages or brisket are doing. CLEAN UP WITH EASE: Designed for an easy clean-up, the hotplate has raised sides preventing grease and oil over-spilling, drawing it instead to the plate opening and into the replaceable foil catchment tin. The telescopic rails on the front, full width drip tray, makes it easy to pull out to replace the foil tin and clean the over-spill. READY, START, COOK: Start cooking quickly and easily with the quartz one start. This first time, every time, the easy start ignition system makes sparking up the BBQ a breeze. CONSTRUCTED TO LAST: Built to last over time, the burner box is built out of high grade stainless steel. With an exterior seam weld, moisture and grease don't get into the joints, preventing rusting. PEACE OF MIND BBQ'ING: Protect yourself and your BBQ when lighting the burners or whilst you are cooking with the built-in flame failure safety device. If the BBQ fails to light or the burners blow out, flame failure immediately cuts off the fuel supply preventing dangerous gas build ups. #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important;

item.g:title: Ooni Karu | Portable Wood and Charcoal Fired Outdoor Pizza Oven BUNDLE DEAL - KARU-BUNDLE
item.g:description: #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important; Ooni Karu | Portable Wood and Charcoal Fired Outdoor Pizza Oven - KARU-BUNDLE Bundle includes 12" Aluminium Peel & Karu 12 Gas Burner Are you looking for a versatile portable pizza oven that’s guaranteed to be a hit at any outdoor picnic? Then look no further than the Ooni Karu Outdoor Pizza Oven. Create authentic wood-fired pizza in just 2 minutes. Capable of reaching temperatures of 500°C within 15 minutes, delight in crispy-crust delicious homemade pizza. Custom-make your pizza just how you like it whether wood-fired or charcoal-fired. Comes with a baking board (Pizza Stone Base). What makes Ooni Karu awesome? - Fueled by real wood or charcoal, Ooni Karu cooks authentic wood-fired, stone-baked pizza in any outdoor space in just 60 seconds. Ooni Karu is also gas compatible – simply order an Ooni Gas Burner attachment to extend your fuel options. Ooni Karu’s custom-designed fuel tray maximizes airflow and delivers a powerful blast of searing flame - load it up with real wood or charcoal, with no excess ash to clean. Ooni Karu will reach 932F in just 15 minutes for epic high temp pizzas, or can cook at lower temperatures through controlled airflow to extend your cooking options. Weighing just 12kg, Ooni Karu offers portability, plus all the power and heat of a larger wood-fired oven. Ooni Karu’s stainless steel body is ceramic fiber-insulated, with a thick Ooni Baking Stone and a patented flame keeper for maximum heat retention. Package Includes: 1 x Ooni Karu Outdoor Pizza Oven 1 x Ooni Karu Baking Board (Internal Pizza Stone / Base of the Oven) 1 x Ooni 12" Aluminium Peel 1 x Ooni Karu 12 Gas Burner #description p.small { display: none !important; }

item.g:title: EXCELSIOR Interlock System 24 volt kit
item.g:description: EXCELSIOR Interlock System 24 volt kit - EGIS002 The 24 Volt Interlock System offers a compliant solution to meet the requirements of the Australian Standard (AS5601) when installing an Excelsior Rangehood above a commercial gas appliance in residential settings. This system ensures safety and adherence to regulations. To achieve this, a gas solenoid valve must be integrated into the gas supply piping for the specific gas appliance. Once the Interlock System is installed and connected to the controller, the solenoid valve will be activated, allowing gas to flow exclusively when the rangehood exhaust fan is operational. This Interlock System is particularly useful when installing a gas barbecue approved for commercial use in a residential alfresco area under an Excelsior BBQ Rangehood. By implementing this safety measure, potential risks associated with gas appliances and exhaust fans are mitigated, providing peace of mind for homeowners and ensuring compliance with the relevant standards. #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd; } #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }#description p.small { display: none !important; Specifiactions: Operational Voltage: 220 to 240 VAC Solenoid Voltage: 24 VAC Max Solenoid Current: 9 VA Max Rangehood Current: 6 amps Inductive Fuse Type: 100mA M205 Solenoid 24VAC: 1/2” BSP female – Max inlet pressure 5kPa #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } #description p.small { display: none; }

item.g:title: Camp Chef Woodwind Wifi 24 Pellet Grill - PG24CL
item.g:description: Camp Chef Woodwind Wifi 24 Pellet Grill - PG24CL If good food is your name and smoking is your game then hop on the Woodwind Wifi train. Equipped with our new PID and WIFI enabled controller, you'll be able to change the temperature, set timers, and receive notifications when your meat reaches your set temperature inch”all from the palm of your hand. Taste the difference and obtain flawlessly smoked food by tailoring your grill's Smoke Number on the Camp Chef Connect App. Then, when the smoking ceases, clean-up is a breeze with our patented Ash Kickin' Cleanout.

item.g:title: Camp Chef Woodwind Wifi 24 with Sidekick
item.g:description: Camp Chef Woodwind Wifi 24 with Sidekick If good food is your name and smoking is your game then hop on the Woodwind Wifi train. Equipped with our new PID and WIFI enabled controller, you'll be able to change the temperature, set timers, and receive notifications when your meat reaches your set temperature inch” all from the palm of your hand. Taste the difference and obtain flawlessly smoked food by tailoring your grill's Smoke Number on the Camp Chef Connect App. Then, when the smoking ceases, clean-up is a breeze with our patented Ash Kickin' Cleanout. The included Sidekick attachment will forever change the grill game. The cooking possibilities are endless when you add a grill box, pizza oven, skillet, or fry griddle. Trust us, you'll want the Sidekick.

item.g:title: Camp Chef Pursuit 20 Portable Pellet Grill
item.g:description: Camp Chef Pursuit 20 Portable Pellet Grill Discover the perfect harmony of portability and woodfire flavour with the Camp Chef Pursuit Pellet Grill. Designed specifically for the adventurous spirit within you, this remarkable grill combines convenience with uncompromising taste. Its compact and collapsible design makes it a dream companion for campers and individuals seeking to maximize space efficiency. Equipped with a generous 10 lb. hopper, you can indulge in uninterrupted grilling sessions without the need for constant pellet refills. Experience the revolutionary Slide and Grill Technology, allowing you to effortlessly switch between direct and indirect heat for versatile cooking options. The Ash Cleanout feature ensures a hassle-free cleanup, making your outdoor culinary escapades even more enjoyable. With its sleek new controller featuring precise PID-controlled temperatures, you have complete command over your cooking environment. And for the ultimate personal touch, customize your smoke settings to achieve the exact level of smokiness you desire. Unleash your inner explorer with the Camp Chef Pursuit Pellet Grill and embark on unforgettable culinary adventures wherever you go.

item.g:title: Camp Chef PELLET GRILL BLANKET - 24"
item.g:description: Camp Chef PELLET GRILL BLANKET - 24" Just because the weather’s turned cold doesn’t mean your grill has to do the same. With the 24-inch pellet grill blanket, smoking and grilling can be year-round activities. The blanket is made of fire-resistant fibreglass that will help keep your grill warm and reduce the amount of pellets it needs to burn in the cold weather. It might be snowing outside, but your pellet grill is smoking hot. Note: this version of the Pellet Grill Blanket - 24" does not have side coverings.

item.g:title: Camp Chef PELLET GRILL BLANKET - 36"
item.g:description: Camp Chef PELLET GRILL BLANKET - 36" Just because the weather’s turned cold doesn’t mean your grill has to do the same. The blanket is made of fire-resistant fibreglass that will help keep your grill warm and reduce the amount of pellets it needs to burn in the cold weather. item.g:title: Camp Chef Mountain Series Everest 2X High Output Two-Burner
item.g:description: Camp Chef Mountain Series Everest 2X High Output Two-Burner Designed for avid outdoorsmen, the new sleek design of the Everest 2X Mountain Series system is both lightweight and portable. Packed with two, 20,000 BTU burners, the Everest offers quick, matchless ignition no matter your coordinates. Adventure seekers will enjoy a generous 215 sq. inches of cook space engineered for maximum food output. So get out there and conquer your Everest. This is an updated product with a new regulator.

item.g:description: PK Grills PK360 Smoker and Grill - PK360-STBX-D The Original PK Grill & Smoker is an icon in the North American BBQ world and view by many as one the best Charcoal cookers around even 60 years later. PK Grills PK360 Smoker and Grill
item.g:description: PK Grills PK360 Smoker and Grill - PK360-STBX-D The Original PK Grill & Smoker is an icon in the North American BBQ world and view by many as one the best Charcoal cookers around even 60 years later. Now the guys at PK have released the PK 360 Grill & Smoker. With 2322cm2 (360 square inches) of cooking space, The PK360 cook chamber is constructed entirely from rust-proof aluminum. Aluminum conducts heat 4x more efficiently than steel, which means heat is dispersed evenly throughout the capsule. With its build you will be sure to have the your PK360 for many decades. #description p.small { display: none; } #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } SPECIFICATIONS : MODEL NUMBER: PK360-STBX-D Material: Rust-proof cast aluminum construction. item.g:title: PK Grills PK300 Grill & Smoker
item.g:description: PK Grills PK300 Grill & Smoker - PK300-AF-TC Dubbed the "New Original," this title encapsulates the essence of our grill's modernized retro design. Beneath its upgraded nostalgic structure lies a cooking apparatus that embodies the fundamental ethos and straightforward cooking elegance of the original cast aluminum PK Grill from its inception in 1952. Remaining steadfast in its purpose to cook, unwavering in its durability, our grill perpetuates the legacy of quality. Just as before, it stands as a true embodiment of authenticity, consistently delivering an experience that's 100% Original. #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } SPECIFICATIONS : MODEL NUMBER: PK300-AF-TC Material: Rust-proof cast aluminum top and bottom. Aluminum cart with stainless steel hardware. Nickel plated steel cooking grid and steel charcoal grate. Stainless Steel cooking grid and charcoal grate available for purchase separately Total Height: 94cm Total Width (Including Cart): 144cm Total Depth: 53cm Cooking Surface Dimensions: 55cm x 35cm Weight: 27kgs Use the "Belly Bar" to hang a towel or stow a set of tongs while you create your barbecue masterpiece. Rest a ramekin of salt or a beer on the small shelf. Speed racks that fit standard sheet pans for easy access and keep your prep area clear (Pans not included) Two cast aluminum shelves that lock the capsule in place and fold down when not in use Radial top vents and bottom vents with easy access control levers New Durahinge™ design offers more stability open or closed High-quality and rust-proof cart construction with cast aluminum lugs and beefy aluminum tubes Interior ash control system contains ash and pre-heats air entering the capsule for a more efficient burn.

item.g:title: PK Grills PKGO FlipKit
item.g:description: PK Grills PKGO FlipKit - PK200-SFL Unlock a world of culinary possibilities by transforming your PKGO into two Hibachi-style grills, effectively doubling your cooking area. Who wouldn't welcome an extra burger? Featuring dual water-shedding radial exhaust vents, a convenient digital probe access door, and a robust Durabilium handle, our design ensures top-notch performance. The real magic lies in achieving true two-zone cooking, offering versatility in your grilling endeavors. Equipped with a molded cradle, a durable charcoal grate, and a reliable cast iron cooking surface, this accessory elevates your grilling experience to new heights. SPECIFICATIONS : MODEL NUMBER: PK200-SFL Material: Rust-proof cast aluminum top and bottom. Cast iron cooking surfaces. Total Height: 33cm Total Width (Including Cart): 50cm Total Depth: 38cm Cooking Surface Dimensions: 43cm x 30cm Weight: 17kgs #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }

item.g:title: PK Grills Grill Grates
item.g:description: PK Grills Grill Grates - PK20360 GrillGrates for the PK360 are here. This PK360-specific GrillGrate® consists of 3 interlocking panels that sit on top of the standard stainless cooking grid of your PK360 Grill to create a highly heat-conductive cooking surface. The magic is in the raised rails, which rapidly transfer heat upward to cook foods fast and evenly, like an infrared cooker. While your PK is designed to eliminate flare-ups when cooking with the capsule closed, GrillGrates block flare-ups from burning your food while the lid is open. They act as a flame shield, allowing for more direct grilling at higher temperatures. This is great for cooking steaks at very high temps and achieving a steakhouse quality sear, and with reduced flare-ups, you’ll get your juiciest, most flavorful food yet. GrillGrates are made of hard anodized aluminum, which conducts heat more efficiently than cast iron or stainless steel. GrillGrates are reversible, so you can flip one or both sides over for smashburgers and griddled food. The world's best competition steak cooks use PK Grills with GrillGrate®. If you love to cook steak, chops, chicken breasts or any other "hot and fast" food, you need a set of these. SPECIFICATIONS : MODEL NUMBER: PK20360 Total Length: 55cm Total Width: 38cm Total Height: 2cm Weight: 3kgs #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }

item.g:title: PK Grills PK360 Griddle- Solid
item.g:description: PK Grills PK360 Griddle- Solid - PK360A-P-S Remember the quick-and-dirty diner burgers of yore? Or perhaps you never stop dreaming of the ultimate smash burger with grilled onions, cheese and bacon. They're both on the menu when you fire up our stainless steel griddle. Simply lift off the grate and lay down the perfect surface for blueberry pancakes, seared lake fish and campfire hash browns. The griddle’s even heat conduction and smooth surface make you — congratulations! — a flap top genius. item.g:title: PK Grills PKGO Grill Grate
item.g:description: PK Grills PKGO Grill Grate - PK200A-GG Nothing sears a steak like GrillGrate®. This PKGO-specific GrillGrate® consists of 3 interlocking panels that sit on top of your PKGO's cooking grid to create a highly heat-conductive cooking surface. The magic is in the raised rails, which rapidly transfer heat upward to cook foods fast and evenly, like an infrared cooker. While your PK is designed to eliminate flare-ups when cooking with the capsule closed, GrillGrates block flare-ups from burning your food while the lid is open. They act as a flame shield, allowing for more direct grilling at higher temperatures. This is great for cooking steaks at very high temps and achieving a steakhouse quality sear, and with reduced flare-ups, you’ll get your juiciest, most flavorful food yet. GrillGrates are made of hard anodized aluminum, which conducts heat more efficiently than cast iron or stainless steel. GrillGrates are reversible, so you can flip one or both sides over for smashburgers and griddled food. The world's best competition steak cooks use PK Grills with GrillGrate®. If you love to cook steak, chops, chicken breasts or any other "hot and fast" food, you need a set of these. SPECIFICATIONS : MODEL NUMBER: PK200A-GG Length: 38cm Width: 27cm Height: 2cm Weight: 1kgs Compatible With: PKGO Camp & Tailgate Grilling System #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; }
