item.g:title: myGRILL® elCocinero™ + Cart
item.g:description: myGRILL® elCocinero™ + Cart - MGELCOwCART Experience a new way to cook with charcoal—where tradition meets intelligent design. The elCocinero™ transforms charcoal grilling into a refined, effortless ritual, giving you the confidence to cook incredible food while staying present with family and friends. It’s all about enjoying the fire, the flavor, and the moment—without the usual guesswork. Designed for cooks who love great results as much as the process, elCocinero™ brings ease and consistency to every session. From casual weeknight grilling to long, relaxed weekend cooks, it adapts to your pace and lets you focus on creativity, not constant monitoring. The result is food that’s deeply satisfying and a grilling experience that feels calm, controlled, and rewarding. Paired with the elCocinero™ Cart, your setup becomes a complete outdoor cooking station. The cart adds flexibility and freedom, allowing you to move your grill exactly where the action is and create a natural hub for preparation, cooking, and serving. It turns your grill into a centerpiece—ready for entertaining, experimenting, and everyday use. Together, the elCocinero™ and Cart reflect the innovative spirit of myGRILL—redefining charcoal grilling as something smarter, more enjoyable, and deeply connected to how modern cooks live and share food.

item.g:title: myGRILL® elCocinero™ Large + Cart - MGELCO-LRGwCART
item.g:description: myGRILL® elCocinero™ Large + Cart - MGELCO-LRGwCART Redefine charcoal cooking with a grill that’s built for those who love to cook big, share more, and enjoy every moment around the fire. The elCocinero™ Large brings a new level of confidence and ease to charcoal grilling, letting you focus on flavor, creativity, and connection rather than constant supervision. Designed for generous gatherings and ambitious cooks, this setup delivers a calm, intuitive grilling experience that feels both modern and deeply rooted in the tradition of cooking over charcoal. From slow, relaxed cooks to lively social barbecues, it supports your rhythm and helps you achieve consistently impressive results with less effort. Paired with the elCocinero™ Cart, your grill becomes a complete outdoor cooking hub. The mobile design encourages flexibility, allowing you to position your grill exactly where it fits best in your space and your event. It naturally brings preparation, cooking, and serving together, making entertaining smoother and more enjoyable. Together, the elCocinero™ Large and Cart showcase the forward-thinking approach of myGRILL, offering a charcoal grilling experience that feels smarter, more social, and perfectly suited to modern outdoor living.

Perfect for when you want real BBQ performance, without the hassle or restrictions of gas bottles. CROSSRAY electric BBQ provides a cooking experience just like a traditional gas BBQ, via the unique high-intensity electric infra-red element technology.

item.g:title: 4000A 28AH HP LITHIUM MULTI FUNCTION JUMPSTARTER IN HARD CASE
item.g:description: 4000A 28AH HP LITHIUM MULTI FUNCTION JUMPSTARTER IN HARD CASE The S4000A 28AH Jumpstarter, the ultimate power companion for those on the go. This multi-function marvel fits into your glovebox and is as much of a must have for your vehicle as a spare tyre. You can be ready to jumpstart your 12V car batteries in just 4 simple steps and the 4000A will easily jump a 10L Diesel engine or most petrol engines and run a portable fridge for up to 5 hours* as well as running other portable devices such as laptops, pumps and more. But it doesn't stop there - the S4000 is also a mobile charging unit for all your devices. With a USB fast charging outlet and wireless capability, you can easily charge your phone or tablet wherever you are. And let's not forget about its handy flashlight function, providing illumination in any situation. Packed in a convenient carry case, this truly is a multi-function unit that comes with everything you need. Get powered up with the S4000 Jumpstarter today! *Portable fridge run times depend on output of Fridge.

item.g:title: Napoleon Cast Iron Plancha Suit BIG Series - 56069
item.g:description: Napoleon Cast Iron Plancha Suit BIG Series - 56069 The Napoleon Cast Iron Plancha is an exceptional addition to your grilling arsenal, specifically designed for the Big Series. Crafted from porcelain-enameled cast iron, it ensures even heating for your cooking needs while simplifying the cleaning process. The surface is slightly angled, allowing it to effectively drain excess fat, resulting in healthier and tastier grilled dishes. With this plancha, you can enhance your grilling experience by achieving precise cooking control and delicious results.

item.g:title: Napoleon Plancha griddle for built in burners - 56091
item.g:description: Napoleon Plancha griddle for built in burners - 56091 The Napoleon 56091 10-Inch Plancha Griddle for Built-In Burners is an exceptional addition to your outdoor culinary arsenal. Crafted from stainless steel, this 10-inch plancha griddle is specifically designed for Built-In 500 and 700 Series Burners, enhancing your grilling capabilities. This plancha griddle opens up a whole new dimension in your cooking experience, providing superior searing capabilities and even heating. It's ideal for achieving restaurant-quality results when grilling seafood, steaks, and vegetables. With this griddle, you can take your outdoor cooking to the next level and create dishes that rival those from the finest restaurants.

item.g:title: myGRILL® Large Spit Rotisserie (for elcocinero™ Standard)
Pit Barrel Cooker - PBX 22.5" - 13498
item.g:description: Pit Barrel Cooker - PBX 22.5" - 13498 The wait is finally over! We are proud to introduce the newest member of the Pit Barrel® lineup, the 22.5" PBX. In addition to being perfect for large backyard cooks, the 22.5" PBX takes the ease of use the 18.5″ Pit Barrel Cooker® has made famous to the next level. The 22.5" PBX will be right at home in a competition setting, catering for your large events, and even cooking for your restaurant. It simply cooks some of the best food you’ve ever tasted, with no hassle, due to the 360º All-Round Heat Dynamics™. Whether you’re new to outdoor cooking or an expert trying to perfect your craft, Pit Barrel® will guarantee perfectly cooked food every time. This large charcoal grill and smoker package includes everything you need to be ready to cook out of the box. All you need is to follow the instructions and lighting process based on the type of cook (grilling or smoking). The 22.5" PBX has a much larger capacity than the 18.5" Pit Barrel Cooker® and is the largest porcelain coated drum cooker on the market. Choose whether you want to cook 16-20 racks of ribs, 4 pork butts or shoulders, 4 full packer briskets, 12-16 chicken halves, 60+ party wings or 4 turkeys – the possibilities are endless. The PBX includes everything you need to get cooking: 22.5” Porcelain Coated Steel Drum 16 Stainless Steel Hooks 3 Steel Hanging Rods Porcelain Coated Charcoal Basket Standard Grill Grate Wooden Hook Remover 3-Point Barrel Stand

item.g:title: Kamado Joe - Joe Junior Heavy Duty Cart with folding shelves - KJ15112524
item.g:description: Kamado Joe - Joe Junior Heavy Duty Cart with folding shelves - KJ15112524 Experience comfortability and convenience while cooking on your Kamado Joe Joe Jr charcoal grill with the Joe Jr™ grill cart. Designed to be the ideal height for grilling, this cart will make creating delicious, charcoal-smoked meals at home or on-the-go seamless and comfortable. The Joe Jr grill cart also includes folding side shelves for additional food preparation space, and caster locking wheels for easy movement. • Heavy-duty grill cart with folding shelves and locking wheels. • Designed to fit Kamado Joe’s Joe Jr portable charcoal grill and smoker. • Includes a bottom shelf for convenient accessory storage. • Accessory only, Joe Junior purchased separately. • Limited qty available.

item.g:title: DISPLAY 85kg Capacity Black SUPER Heavy Duty Rotisserie Charcoal BBQ Spit 240V Motor from The BBQ Store - SHD-3075
item.g:description: DISPLAY 85kg Capacity Black SUPER Heavy Duty Rotisserie Charcoal BBQ Spit 240V Motor from The BBQ Store - SHD-3075 The super heavy duty BBQ spit motor is a high powered barbecuing motor that is designed to promote the easy turning of up to 85kgs of meat at a time. Featuring a 240V powering capacity, it is also able to offer a 5RPM turning operation with its direct drive technology that helps to lessen damage and wear and tear that may be inflicted from rotating so much weight. This motor is able tooffer effortless rotation of balanced meat without being exposed to too much wear and tear, and is ideal for promoting evenly cooked meals that are ready to serve to any family or friend gathering. Designed with an inbuilt cooling fan, this outdoor BBQ grill spit motor is idealfor long term cooking sessions without becoming overheated making it suitable for use on hot days. Ideal for use by frequent rotisserie users, it is ideal for cooking of whole pigs, lambs, goats, and multiple chickens. #description p.small { display: none; }

item.g:title: Foukou fitted in a Cabinet Korakas - R100
item.g:description: Presenting our newest minimalist patio and veranda addition: an integrated, chain-driven BBQ encased within a stylish cabinet, powder-coated for durability. Proudly manufactured in our Nicosia-based factory in Cyprus, this foukou adheres to the highest manufacturing standards, ensuring top-notch quality. Key Specifications: Cabinet dimensions: 113x65cm, standing at 75cm tall Built-in BBQ: 100x50cm, crafted from robust, reinforced steel at 2.5mm thickness Hand-operated crank for customizable skewer height and heat management. Sturdy structure featuring 4 heavy-duty wheels (including 2 brakes) for effortless mobility Abundant storage space beneath the BBQ, equipped with a shelf and a dedicated drawer for the foukou accessories Enhanced security with a stainless steel lock and protective lid for safeguarding the unit Supported by 3mm thick stainless steel brackets and fire bricks at the base, ensuring efficient charcoal use and an extended lifespan of up to 20 years Included Accessories: 7 souvla skewers, each 8mm thick with gears crafted from stainless steel 304G, meticulously engineered 13 kebab skewers, each 4mm thick with with gears crafted from stainless steel 304G 3 triple skewers, each 4mm thick with gears crafted from stainless steel 304G, tailored for shieftalia, sausages and similar items 2 grill racks made of durable stainless steel 304G, covering the BBQ surface for versatile cooking options like lamb chops, steaks, and pitta bread 2 rotating fish grills, with gears crafted from stainless steel 304G Wireless, rechargable motor with adjustable speed, ensuring seamless BBQ operation. Visual display shows the remaining power level of the battery Stainless steel lid for ultimate BBQ protection (306G) Added Benefits: Enjoy complimentary door delivery within approximately 30 days of your order Receive a bonus gift: tongs, a charcoal shovel, and a chimney starter Fireproof paint rated up to 760 degrees Celsius Effortless maintenance of the foukou unit. No need to remove charcoals after each use, simply clear some ashes after multiple uses; Applying WD40 spray to lubricate the chain mechanism and the frame’s guides at the four corners that lift the mechanism before each use If you’re using it once in a while. But if you’re using it often, it’s best to oil these parts every 3-4 times you cook on it. Weight: 63 kilograms Please note: Side tables are available at an additional cost of €75 each, featuring an HPL coating for heightened durability. #description p.small { display: none; }

Load up to 12 pounds of lump charcoal or 18lbs of briquette into the GravityFed™ charcoal hopper, light your fire starter and set your desired cooking temperature on the digital control panel or using the Masterbuilt app. High-heat sear your favourite foods up to 700°F, or use low-and-slow smoking methods to cook for up to 18 hours at 225°F. The Gravity Series 600 grill and smoker are also accessory-ready and compatible with the Masterbuilt Pizza Oven or Gravity Series Rotisserie. Master the art of backyard grilling and smoking with Masterbuilt. item.g:title: Camp Chef Woodwind Pro 36 with Sidekick + 3 Bonus Bags of Pellets
item.g:description: Camp Chef Woodwind Pro 36 with Sidekick + 3 Bonus Bags of Pellets Introducing the Woodwind Pro: the ultimate grill that caters to both control freaks and carefree cooks. Experience the best of bold flavours and abundant smoke with our newly invented Smoke Box. This innovative addition allows you to effortlessly customize heat and flavour simultaneously, making your grilling dreams come true. Whether you prefer wood pellets, wood chunks, wood chips, or even charcoal, the Smoke Box lets you experiment with various fuel types while effortlessly adjusting the heat output using the damper valve. Want to explore new techniques like cold smoking? Activate the Fan Only Mode for endless possibilities. Looking for a more relaxed experience? Just fill up the hopper and ignite the pellet grill to enjoy that signature mild smoke taste. Elevate your grilling game and make a bold statement with the Woodwind Pro. Camp Chef Competition Blend Premium Pellets 9kg Camp Chef Premium Competition Blend Hardwood BBQ Pellets. No added fillers or binders guarantee premium wood-fired performance with every cook. Camp Chef Competition Blend is a tasty mix of maple, hickory, and cherry woods, so it's appropriate for every meal.

Introducing the Woodwind Pro, the ultimate grill that caters to both meticulous control freaks and carefree cooks. This groundbreaking invention allows you to explore and experiment with a wide range of hardwood pellets, wood chunks, wood chips, and even charcoal, all while maintaining precise control over heat and flavour. item.g:title: DISPLAY Oklahoma Joe's Bronco Pro Drum Smoker (Black) - 19202099-DIS
item.g:description: DISPLAY MODEL Oklahoma Joe's Bronco Pro Drum Smoker (Black) - 19202099 Introducing the Oklahoma Joe’s® Bronco Pro Drum Smoker—an elite choice designed to exceed the performance expectations of seasoned competition pitmasters. Engineered with upgraded fuel capacity and cooking surface, coupled with precise control features and customizable options, this smoker stands as the pinnacle rig for professionals who demand nothing but the best. When the pressure is on, the Bronco Pro rises to the occasion, delivering unparalleled results. Featuring a generous 55cm cooking surface and a substantial 7.7kg fuel capacity, this smoker offers unmatched competitive performance. Its innovative airflow control system ensures consistent and precise smoking temperatures, allowing you to achieve perfect results with every cook. With a versatile setup including a cooking grate, three meat hangers, nine meat hooks, and a heat diffuser, you have the freedom to smoke your way, adapting to any culinary challenge. Cleanup is a breeze thanks to the large ash pan, porcelain-coated components, and convenient drain cap—perfect for competitions where every minute counts. Built to endure the rigors of competition, the heavy-gauge steel construction guarantees lasting durability. The oversized charcoal basket holds enough fuel for over 15 hours of smoking time, ensuring uninterrupted cooking sessions. Designed with convenience and functionality in mind, the Bronco Pro boasts a hinged lid with a gasket for a tight seal, a rubber handle grip that remains cool-to-the-touch, and a barrel-mounted temperature gauge with glow-in-the-dark accents for easy monitoring, even in low-light conditions. Plus, with large wagon-style wheels and a side shelf for holding tools and supplies, this smoker offers unmatched mobility and organization. Step up your smoking game with the Oklahoma Joe’s® Bronco Pro Drum Smoker—the ultimate choice for serious pitmasters ready to take their craft to the next level. 16 x 170g Chickens Thighs 3 x 3.6kg Pork Shoulders *Food sizes vary, this is a guide only. Please check sizing before use.

Schmick Quiet Running Front Venting Under Bench Glass Door Bar Fridge - Model SK116L-B
item.g:description: Schmick Quiet Running Front Venting Under Bench Glass Door Bar Fridge - Model SK116L-B The Schmick SK116L-B is a stylish and reliable under bench glass door bar fridge, designed with quiet operation and seamless integration in mind. Its front venting system makes it perfect for built-in applications, while the triple glazed LOW E glass door helps reduce condensation and improve energy efficiency. The door is reversible and comes with a lock, providing flexibility and added security to suit any space. Inside, the fridge is powered by trusted brand-name components, including a Schmick ECO electronic controller, quiet-running internal and rear fans, a high-quality low-energy compressor, and a durable Taiwanese transformer—all working together to ensure long-term, efficient performance. A unique lighting feature allows users to switch between blue and white LED illumination, with three soft-glow light strips along the sides and top, creating a visually appealing display that's ideal for showcasing drinks in both home and commercial environments. Combining performance, design, and durability, the SK116L-B is a standout choice for any bar or kitchen setup. *This unit is also available in stainless steel door frame and grill (Model SK116-SS), heated glass versions (Models SK116R-HD & SK116L-HD) and Solid door version SK116-SD.

The triple glazed LOW E glass door is designed to reduce condensation while enhancing thermal performance, and it features a reversible configuration with a secure lock for added convenience. Internally, the fridge is powered by quality components, including a Schmick ECO electronic controller, high-performance low-energy compressor, quiet rear and internal fans, and a reliable Taiwanese transformer—ensuring smooth, long-lasting operation. Visually, it offers a striking presentation with switchable LED lighting that allows you to choose between a crisp white or ambient blue glow. Three full-length soft LED strips along the sides and top of the interior create a vibrant yet elegant lighting effect, perfectly showcasing your drinks and adding a touch of sophistication to any environment. *This unit is also available in black door frame and grill (Model SK116 B), and heated glass versions coming September 2020 (Models SK116R HD & SK116L HD).

item.g:description: Camp Chef Flat Top GRIDIRON 36 Grill - FTG36AU You may think that a griddle is just a griddle, but once you start using one you’ll quickly notice that not all griddles are created equal. item.g:title: Artusi 104cm Built-In Gas BBQ Matte Black - ABBQ1MB
item.g:description: Artusi 104cm Built-In Gas BBQ – Matte Black - ABBQ1MB Introducing the Artusi 104cm Built-In Gas BBQ, a high-quality outdoor cooking solution that's both stylish and built to last. Finished in a sleek matte black enamel, this BBQ is designed for durability and modern outdoor spaces. It features an automatic Piezo ignition system powered by a concealed D cell battery, making it quick and easy to light. Cleaning is simple thanks to the removable grease container and main catcher. Side control knobs give you precise control while cooking, and the built-in oil/fat reservoir helps keep things tidy. The BBQ comes pre-set for LPG use, but it can be converted to Natural Gas (conversion hose sold separately). It includes a removable solid cast iron grill plate and a flat hotplate, which can be switched around to suit different cooking needs. Both have self-locking notches for extra safety. The hotplate is also specially designed to resist warping, ensuring even heat across the surface. With premium materials and thoughtful features, the Artusi 104cm Built-In Gas BBQ is a reliable and versatile choice for anyone who loves outdoor cooking.

item.g:title: Artusi Halmo 4 Burner Gas Grill Built-In BBQ - ABIBBQ4

Designed for those who love outdoor entertaining, this built-in BBQ blends contemporary aesthetics with practical convenience. With the Artusi Built-in BBQ at the heart of your alfresco setup, your outdoor space transforms into a hub for memorable meals, relaxed evenings, and unforgettable gatherings with the people who matter most.

item.g:title: Artusi 90 cm Canopy Rangehood - ACG900X
item.g:description: Artusi 90 cm Canopy Rangehood – ACG900X Keep your kitchen fresh and stylish with the Artusi ACG900X 90 cm Canopy Rangehood, a powerful ventilation solution designed to remove smoke, steam, and odours with ease. Featuring a maximum airflow rate of 900m³/hr, this rangehood ensures a cleaner cooking environment, even during high-heat or heavy-duty cooking. Choose from three speed settings to suit your needs, all controlled by easy-to-use front push buttons. The washable aluminium filters trap grease effectively and can be easily removed for cleaning, helping to maintain long-term performance. Equipped with LED lighting, the rangehood offers clear illumination over your cooktop, improving visibility while cooking. The stainless steel body with elegant curved glass adds a modern, sophisticated touch to any kitchen, and it’s also easy to maintain. Key Features: 90cm canopy design with curved glass 900m³/hr max airflow for effective ventilation 3 speed settings with front button control Washable aluminium filters for easy maintenance Bright, energy-efficient LED cooktop lighting Sleek stainless steel finish for modern kitchens Perfect for those who value performance and aesthetics, the Artusi ACG900X delivers both in a stylish and functional design.

Whether you’re hosting a weekend barbecue with friends or cooking a casual family meal outdoors, this accessory helps deliver more reliable and satisfying results. Built with durability in mind, the Artusi BBQ Ceramic Grill Brick is a dependable addition to any barbecue setup. Its simple yet effective design makes it a valuable tool for anyone looking to elevate their outdoor cooking and enjoy perfectly grilled meals with confidence.

item.g:title: Artusi 30cm Maximus Series Natural Gas Stainless Steel Cooktop - AGH30XFFD
item.g:description: Artusi 30cm Maximus Series Natural Gas Cooktop – AGH30XFFD Compact, powerful, and stylish, the Artusi 30cm Maximus Series Natural Gas Cooktop is the perfect solution for small kitchens or as an additional cooking zone. Featuring a sleek stainless steel finish and two gas burners—including one rapid burner—this domino-style cooktop is ideal for versatile, high-performance cooking. Automatic electronic ignition ensures a fast, hassle-free start, while built-in flame failure devices offer enhanced safety by cutting off gas if the flame is extinguished. Sturdy black enamel trivets provide excellent stability for pots and pans, supporting even heat distribution for efficient cooking. Designed for both form and function, the stainless steel surface not only adds a professional look to your kitchen but is also easy to clean. Backed by a 24-month manufacturer warranty, this cooktop combines reliability, safety, and style in one compact unit. Key Features: 30cm domino-style gas cooktop – ideal for small spaces 2 gas burners including 1 rapid burner Automatic electronic ignition for easy lighting Flame failure safety devices on each burner Black enamel trivets for stable, even heating Sleek, easy-to-clean stainless steel surface 24-month manufacturer warranty Perfect for apartments, compact kitchens, or as a secondary cooktop.

item.g:title: Artusi 60cm Canopy Rangehood - ATH601B
item.g:description: Artusi 60cm Canopy Rangehood – ATH601B Upgrade your kitchen with the stylish and efficient Artusi 60cm Canopy Rangehood (ATH601B). Designed with both form and function in mind, this rangehood features a sleek fingerprint-resistant stainless steel body and a modern black glass facia panel—a perfect fit for contemporary kitchens. The touch control panel with white LED indicators makes it easy to operate, while two bright LED lights give you clear visibility while cooking. Choose from three fan speeds to suit everything from simmering sauces to sizzling steaks. A handy 9-minute delay timer automatically switches the rangehood off after use, helping reduce energy use and keeping your kitchen fresh. It includes 2 washable aluminium filters and 2 charcoal filters for recirculating mode, offering flexible installation and effective odour removal. Optional ducting kits are available online for custom setups, making the ATH601B a smart and adaptable choice for any home. Stylish, functional, and easy to clean—the Artusi ATH601B is the perfect finishing touch for your kitchen.

item.g:title: Artusi 60cm Stainless Steel Canopy Rangehood - ATH601X

Featuring intuitive touch controls with a white LED indicator, the ATH601X offers three fan speeds to suit any cooking task, from simmering to searing. A 9-minute delay timer allows the rangehood to run after cooking, clearing residual smoke and odours for a fresher kitchen environment. Bright dual LED lights provide clear visibility over your cooktop, while washable aluminium filters and included charcoal filters support both ducted and recirculating installations. Optional ducting kits are also available for a tailored setup. Combining elegant design with smart functionality, the Artusi ATH601X is the perfect addition to any modern kitchen.

item.g:title: Artusi 90cm Canopy Rangehood - ATH900X

item.g:title: Artusi 190L Double Door Outdoor Beverage Centre - AOF2B
item.g:description: Artusi 190L Double Door Outdoor Beverage Centre – AOF2B Upgrade your outdoor entertaining area with the Artusi 190L Double Door Beverage Centre. With a spacious 190L capacity, it holds hundreds of bottles or cans—ideal for parties, family barbecues, or relaxing afternoons. The four adjustable shelves let you customise the space to fit everything from soft drinks to wine and beer. Easily control the temperature range from 0–10°C with the user-friendly digital touch panel. The self-closing double doors help keep the cold air in, while the built-in lock keeps your drinks safe from children or unwanted access. LED lighting gently illuminates the interior, making it easy to find what you need—even at night. Plus, the UV-safe black stainless steel finish adds a sleek, modern touch while protecting the fridge from outdoor elements. Note: For best performance, avoid placing the fridge in direct sunlight. It can be used in shaded or semi-covered areas with UV protection.

item.g:title: Artusi 190L Outdoor Beverage Centre - AOF2S

item.g:title: Artusi 307L Outdoor Beverage Centre - AOF3S
item.g:description: Artusi 307L Outdoor Beverage Centre – AOF3S Make outdoor entertaining easier with the spacious and stylish Artusi 307L Outdoor Beverage Centre. item.g:title: Cyprus Grill Starter Bundle - Deluxe Auto (Black) Souvla Package Deal with Rechargeable 20kg Variable Speed Motor & Raised Grill - CG-0704C-SSB-BUNDLE
item.g:description: Cyprus Grill Starter Bundle - Deluxe Auto (Black) Souvla Package Deal with Rechargeable 20kg Variable Speed Motor & Raised Grill - CG-0704C-SSB-BUNDLE The Cyprus Grill Deluxe Auto is our most popular model, and it is an innovative charcoal grill barbeque designed to cook your meat evenly and conveniently. The Deluxe Auto Large Skewer Gear Box is triangular in shape and has 2 x lower skewers and 1 x upper skewer. The Deluxe Auto advantage is when you are cooking different meats, this allows for different cooking temps (e.g Chicken on the upper skewer for a slower cook to allow the inside to cook properly). The Deluxe Auto will comfortably feed 18 - 20 people per cook. Using the Raised grill included will allow you to grill anything not suitable for a soulva while still getting that perfect charcoal flavour. With the way the grill works wit the Cyrpus Grill you'll be able to control the level of heat by raising the grill up and down similar to controlling the heat for the soulav. item.g:title: Fireboard 2 Pro
item.g:description: Fireboard 2 Pro Take your temperature tracking to the next level with the FireBoard 2 Pro—our most advanced thermometer yet, built for high-heat environments and serious grilling performance. Designed with Type K thermocouples, the FireBoard 2 Pro delivers lightning-fast and highly accurate readings across an extreme temperature range—ideal for pizza ovens, wood stoves, smokers, and more. With probes rated up to 1200°F, you’re ready for any cooking challenge. Built-in FireBoard Drive technology means you can connect a fan controller without needing additional cables—just plug in a FireBoard Blower (sold separately) and take full control of your pit temperature. Seamlessly connect to your Wi-Fi network and monitor real-time temps from anywhere via the FireBoard app on iPhone, Android, or the web. The bright LCD display, Bluetooth 4.0 (BLE), and internal rechargeable battery ensure you’re always ready to cook.

item.g:title: FireBoard Pulse - Stainless Steel
item.g:description: FireBoard Pulse – Stainless Steel The FireBoard Pulse is a completely wireless meat thermometer designed for seamless temperature tracking and ultimate cooking freedom. Engineered with dual sensors, the Pulse monitors both the internal temperature of your food and the ambient temperature inside your grill—all without a single wire. One sensor is located near the tip of the stainless steel probe for accurate meat readings, while the second sensor in the ceramic end captures ambient grill temps. Whether you're smoking low and slow or searing at high heat, the Pulse delivers fast, reliable data right to your device. Bluetooth-enabled, the Pulse pairs effortlessly with the FireBoard 2 Series, FireBoard Spark, Yoder Smokers, and smartphones. For extended range and improved signal through metal grill bodies, pair your FireBoard 2 with the optional S1G Antenna. The FireBoard Pulse brings total freedom to your cook—precision tracking with zero wires. Simple, smart, and built to perform.

item.g:title: Witt Etna Rotante Gas Powered Pizza Oven w/ Twin Burner & Rotating Stone 16" - DISPLAY UNIT
item.g:description: WITT Etna Rotante Gas Powered Pizza Oven w/ Twin Burner & Rotating Stone 16" - Orange - 80650142 Discover the WITT Etna Rotante Gas Powered Pizza Oven, the pinnacle of pizza perfection for home enthusiasts. Engineered with an award-winning design and crafted from premium materials, this oven promises durability and superior performance, elevating your pizza-making skills. The Etna Rotante features an impressive heat-up time, reaching 500°C (950°F) swiftly, ensuring you're ready to bake whenever the craving strikes. Its U-shaped main burner guarantees even heat distribution, creating the coveted leopard-spotted, crunchy crusts every pizza lover dreams of. Thanks to double insulation, this oven not only heats up rapidly but also maintains efficiency and eco-friendliness. The gas-fueled design offers unparalleled ease and control, making it simple to achieve consistent, restaurant-quality results. An extra booster burner beneath the rotating pizza stone ensures a steady, even temperature, facilitating a seamless flow of perfectly cooked pizzas. Preheating to 500°C (950°F) in just 15 minutes, the booster burner and the rotating pizza stone combine to deliver 360 degrees of crust crispness, producing the best homemade pizzas in under a minute. Elevate your culinary adventures with the WITT Etna Rotante Gas Powered Pizza Oven with Rotating Stone and enjoy the ultimate pizza experience at home. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) What Makes the Booster Burner a Game Changer? In traditional pizza ovens, sliding a pizza in can cause the stone’s temperature to drop significantly, requiring time to reheat. The Witt Etna Rotante’s booster burner continuously heats the rotating pizza stone from below, ensuring it remains at the ideal temperature for immediate use. How Long Does the Oven Take to Cool Down? Cooling time can vary based on ambient temperature. The Witt Etna Rotante Pizza Oven, known for its excellent temperature consistency and efficient insulation, typically takes around one and a half hours to cool down completely. **Important:** Never touch the oven's surface or stone until it has fully cooled. What Type of Gas Should Be Used? This oven is designed for use with LPG gas only. Can I Use Plastic Tools Inside the Hot Oven? No, plastic tools can melt and damage the pizza stone. We recommend avoiding the use of any plastic tools or brushes until the oven has completely cooled down.

item.g:title: Topnotch Custom Made Stainless Steel Hot Plate 322x490mm - PSS322X490
item.g:description: Topnotch Stainless Steel Hot Plate 322x490mm - PSS322x490 Stainless Steel Hot Plate: Topnotch™ barbeque plates are manufactured from a special grade of heat transferring stainless steel. It is the composition of the material which gives the Topnotch™ Stainless Steel Hot Plates the special ability to transfer and retain heat as well as being corrosion resistant. Topnotch™ Barbeque Plates are paint & chemical free, and extremely durable. Past problems associated with the use of Stainless Steel, like poor heat transfer and food sticking have been overcome through intense research and development of the material used to produce the Topnotch™ range of Products. Are you aware that Cast Iron has its limitations? Cast Iron can easily rust once the protective paint has burned off and can then react with salts and marinades. One of the major problems with Cast Iron is that it is produced from recycled metal which causes the Cast Iron to be porous. The chemicals used in cleaning, combined with any rust present, seep into the sponge-like metal and these potentially harmful properties can be released into the food, which we in turn digest. Unlike Cast Iron surfaces the Topnotch™ Stainless Steel surface is non-porous, so remnants of past food and oil can not become trapped within the surface. This is particularly important in Australia’s climate as bacteria can easily multiply if the surface is just warmed and not heated to 64 degrees centigrade and above. Also, food cooked on your Topnotch™ Stainless Steel Hotplate will not take on the flavours of anything else you’ve previously cooked on the BBQ. No curing is required, just wipe with a clean cloth, then preheat for approx. 10 mins. Plate temperature should be between (160°c to 175°c for canola oil) or (150°c to 160°c for olive oil) and then you are ready to cook. (Ensure the oil used, has a burn point above 160°c.) #customers { font-family: "Trebuchet MS", Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } #customers td, #customers th { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 8px; } #customers tr:nth-child(even){background-color: #f2f2f2;} #customers tr:hover {background-color: #ddd;} #customers th { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; text-align: left; background-color: #f25b12; color: white; } #description p.small { display: none; }

item.g:title: DISPLAY Napoleon Built in 700 Series 32" with Rear Burner - BIG32RBINSS-AU Natural Gas
item.g:description: DISPLAY Napoleon Built-in 700 Series 32" with Rear Burner - BIG32RBINSS-AU The Built-In 700 Series 32-inch Gas Grill with Rear Infrared and Bottom Burner provides the high-quality grilling you have come to expect from Napoleon's gas barbecues, built seamlessly into your ideal outdoor kitchen. The 304-grade stainless construction ensures stylish longevity and unparalleled performance. Thick, 9.5mm stainless steel cooking grids are virtually maintenance-free and provide iconic WAVE™ sear marks. Precise temperature control and the ACCU-PROBE™ temperature gauge ensure that you're searing, smoking, roasting, rotisserizing, and baking with ease. The JETFIRE™ ignition system lights burners quickly with a jet of flame. Enjoy ambience and safety, the control knobs SafetyGlow a glorious blue changing to red when burners are in use. The Built-In 700 Series 32-inch Gas Grill has been designed specifically for ease of installation with integrated trim and longer electrical wiring for no design and functionality restrictions on installation. (Rotisserie Kit Included with BBQ.)

item.g:title: myGRILL elCocinero Regular Cart/Trolley only - BBQ not Included - MGELCO-RC
item.g:description: myGRILL elCocinero Regular Cart/Trolley only - BBQ not Included - MGELCO-RC Experience charcoal cooking reimagined as a calm, confident, and deeply social ritual. The myGRILL® elCocinero™ + Cart brings together intelligent design and timeless fire cooking, creating an outdoor setup that feels as enjoyable to use as the food it produces is to share. At the heart of this experience is the elCocinero™, a charcoal grill designed to let you slow down and stay present. It supports a more intuitive way of cooking—one that encourages creativity, consistency, and connection without the stress of constant checking or adjustment. Whether you’re cooking a relaxed midweek meal or hosting a long weekend gathering, the experience feels controlled, rewarding, and effortlessly engaging. Paired with the elCocinero™ Cart, the grill becomes more than just a cooking tool—it becomes a destination. The cart adds freedom and flow to your outdoor space, allowing you to move your grill to where conversations happen and meals naturally come together. Preparation, cooking, and serving blend seamlessly, making entertaining feel smoother and more enjoyable. Together, the elCocinero™ and Cart reflect the forward-thinking philosophy of myGRILL—elevating charcoal grilling into a modern lifestyle experience that values flavor, togetherness, and ease. It’s a setup designed for people who love the process as much as the results, turning every cook into a moment worth savoring. Cart/Trolley only. BBQ not included.

item.g:title: WITT Etna Rotante Pizza Oven ULTIMATE BUNDLE - Orange
item.g:description: WITT Etna Rotante Pizza Oven ULTIMATE BUNDLE - Orange Discover the WITT Etna Rotante Gas Powered Pizza Oven, the pinnacle of pizza perfection for home enthusiasts. Engineered with an award-winning design and crafted from premium materials, this oven promises durability and superior performance, elevating your pizza-making skills. The Etna Rotante features an impressive heat-up time, reaching 500°C (950°F), ensuring you're ready to bake whenever the craving strikes. Its U-shaped main burner guarantees even heat distribution, creating the coveted leopard-spotted, crunchy crusts every pizza lover dreams of. Thanks to double insulation, this oven not only heats up rapidly but also maintains efficiency and eco-friendliness. The gas-fueled design offers unparalleled ease and control, making it simple to achieve consistent, restaurant-quality results. An extra booster burner beneath the rotating pizza stone ensures a steady, even temperature, facilitating a seamless flow of perfectly cooked pizzas. Ready for Pizzas in just 15 minutes, the booster burner and the rotating pizza stone combine to deliver 360 degrees of crust crispness, producing the best homemade pizzas in under a minute. Elevate your culinary adventures with the WITT Etna Rotante Gas Powered Pizza Oven with Rotating Stone and enjoy the ultimate pizza experience at home. This package also includes the following Witt accessories: 14" perforated peel, infrared thermometer, Etna Rotante Cover, rocking pizza cutter, Pizza Oven Table, and a Pizza Oven Cleaning Brush. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) What Makes the Booster Burner a Game Changer? In traditional pizza ovens, sliding a pizza in can cause the stone’s temperature to drop significantly, requiring time to reheat. The Witt Etna Rotante’s booster burner continuously heats the rotating pizza stone from below, ensuring it remains at the ideal temperature for immediate use. How Long Does the Oven Take to Cool Down? Cooling time can vary based on ambient temperature. The Witt Etna Rotante Pizza Oven, known for its excellent temperature consistency and efficient insulation, typically takes around one and a half hours to cool down completely. **Important:** Never touch the oven's surface or stone until it has fully cooled. What Type of Gas Should Be Used? This oven is designed for use with LPG gas only. Can I Use Plastic Tools Inside the Hot Oven? No, plastic tools can melt and damage the pizza stone. We recommend avoiding the use of any plastic tools or brushes until the oven has completely cooled down.
